# Nexyyra Events

> Luxury event management company in Pune, Maharashtra, India — weddings, corporate events, destination celebrations, and celebrity experiences since 2012.

Website: https://www.nexyyra.com

## About

Nexyyra Events is a premium event planning and production company serving clients across India. We specialize in end-to-end luxury experiences — from intimate weddings to large-scale corporate galas and destination celebrations.

## Services

- Luxury Wedding Planning
- Destination Weddings
- Corporate Events & Brand Activations
- Celebrity & VIP Event Management
- Concert & Exhibition Management
- Fashion Shows & Cultural Events
- Venue Curation & Event Production
